---
title: "PSY 8712 Week 8 Project"
author: "Julia Hong"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    number_sections: true
knit: (function(inputFile, encoding) {rmarkdown::render(inputFile, encoding = encoding, output_dir = "../out")})
---

# **Reproducible Image and Online Resources**

An image of this project as of *`r Sys.Date()`* can be accessed by [clicking this link](https://mybinder.org).

An interactive web app is available by [clicking this link instead](https://shinyapp.io).

# **Script Settings and Resources**

# **Data Import and Cleaning**

# **Visualization**

# **Analysis**
